args.query:
SELECT ppi.System, ppi.Name, ppi.Version, ppi.ProjectName, pi.Project_Information, pi.Licenses AS ProjectLicenses
FROM project_packageversion ppi
JOIN project_info pi
  ON pi.Project_Information LIKE '%' || ppi.ProjectName || '%'
WHERE ppi.System='NPM' AND ppi.ProjectType='GITHUB';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ppi.System, ppi.Name, ppi.Version, ppi.ProjectName, pi.Project_Information, pi.Licenses AS ProjectLicenses

WHERE ppi.System='NPM' AND ppi.ProjectType='GITHUB';
